description: Recto: Letter draft addressed to Shemuel Kohen, ʿOvadya Levi, and Moshe Rofe. In Judaeo-Arabic. Mentions someone traveling to Istanbul and mentions the addressees' enemies. Verso: Letter draft addressed to Avraham b. Ẓaʿir. In Judaeo-Arabic. Unclear if it is part of the same letter as recto.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
